_schema: macron_lexicon v2. Key = unmacronized lemma (as LatinCy la_core_web_lg returns). The graded gate macronizes the citation + principal_parts forms verbatim; an inflected form NOT listed here is flag-and-warn (not reject), per the graded-gate spec (flag-and-warn, not reject). Curation sources: the original A&G + Ørberg LLPSI Familia Romana starter set (source='A&G+Ørberg', ~45 lemmas, the more carefully curated — takes precedence on collision) PLUS the DCC Latin Core Vocabulary (source='DCC', CC BY-SA 3.0, ~1,000 macronized lemmas from Lodge 1922 + OLD, transcribed verbatim from the DCC HTML table — macrons are NOT LLM-generated). Noun genitives + adjective fem/neuter are reconstructed from DCC endings so the gate can macronize those inflected forms. Full Logeion/Alatius long-tail macronization (the 2,000-3,000-word target) is a documented later phase. Each entry: pos, class, gender (nouns), citation (macronized), principal_parts (macronized), source, note. Generator: bundled latin data (in-tree, see latin_data/).
